devstral-small-2.prompt: Send idle workers to gather food
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: gather food
-- Description: Send idle workers to nearest food deposit

local workers = ctx:idle_units("Pawdler")
if not workers or #workers == 0 then return end

for _, worker in ipairs(workers) do
    local deposit = ctx:nearest_deposit(worker.x, worker.y, "Food")
    if deposit then
        ctx:gather({worker.id}, deposit.id)
    end
end
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Attack! Send all combat units at the enemy
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: attack
-- Description: Send all combat units to attack the nearest enemy

local combat_units = ctx:my_units()
local enemy = ctx:nearest_enemy(0, 0) -- Start from origin if no specific target

if not enemy then return end

-- Filter out non-combat units (workers, etc.)
local attackers = {}
for _, unit in ipairs(combat_units) do
    if unit.kind ~= "Pawdler" then
        table.insert(attackers, unit.id)
    end
end

if #attackers == 0 then return end

ctx:attack_units(attackers, enemy.id)
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Make my Hissers kite away from melee enemies
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: kite
-- Description: Make Hissers kite away from melee enemies

local hissers = ctx:my_units("Hisser")
if not hissers or #hissers == 0 then return end

for _, hisser in ipairs(hissers) do
    local nearest_enemy = ctx:nearest_enemy(hisser.x, hisser.y)
    if nearest_enemy and nearest_enemy.attack_type == "Melee" then
        local safe_pos = ctx:position_at_range(hisser.x, hisser.y, nearest_enemy.x, nearest_enemy.y, nearest_enemy.range + 1)
        if safe_pos then
            ctx:move_units({hisser.id}, safe_pos.x, safe_pos.y)
        end
    end
end
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Focus fire the weakest enemy near my army
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: focus fire
-- Description: Focus fire the weakest enemy near my army

local army = ctx:my_units()
if #army == 0 then return end

-- Find the weakest enemy near the army
local weakest = nil
local weakest_hp = math.huge
for _, unit in ipairs(army) do
    local enemy = ctx:weakest_enemy_in_range(unit.x, unit.y, unit.range)
    if enemy and enemy.hp < weakest_hp then
        weakest = enemy
        weakest_hp = enemy.hp
    end
end

-- Focus fire if a weak enemy is found
if weakest then
    local attacker_ids = {}
    for _, unit in ipairs(army) do
        if ctx:distance_squared_to_nearest_enemy(unit.id) <= unit.range * unit.range then
            table.insert(attacker_ids, unit.id)
        end
    end
    if #attacker_ids > 0 then
        ctx:attack_units(attacker_ids, weakest.id)
    end
end
```

```lua
-- Intent: retreat
-- Description: Retreat all units to base location

-- Find base location (TheBox)
local base = ctx:my_buildings("TheBox")[1]
if not base then return end

-- Retreat all units to base
local all_units = ctx:my_units()
if #all_units == 0 then return end

local unit_ids = {}
for _, u in ipairs(all_units) do
    table.insert(unit_ids, u.id)
end

ctx:move_units(unit_ids, base.x, base.y)
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Set up a flanking maneuver with Nuisances from the east while Chonks push center
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: flanking maneuver
-- Description: Send Nuisances to attack from the east while Chonks push from the center

-- Get all Nuisances and Chonks
local nuisances = ctx:my_units("Nuisance")
local chonks = ctx:my_units("Chonk")

-- Find enemy positions to determine attack points
local enemies = ctx:enemy_units()
if #enemies == 0 then return end

-- Calculate average enemy position for center push
local avg_x, avg_y = 0, 0
for _, e in ipairs(enemies) do
    avg_x = avg_x + e.x
    avg_y = avg_y + e.y
end
avg_x = avg_x / #enemies
avg_y = avg_y / #enemies

-- East flank position (relative to enemy center)
local east_x = avg_x + 15
local east_y = avg_y

-- Center push position
local center_x = avg_x
local center_y = avg_y + 5

-- Execute flanking maneuver
if #nuisances > 0 then
    ctx:attack_move({nuisances[1].id}, east_x, east_y)
end

if #chonks > 0 then
    ctx:attack_move({chonks[1].id}, center_x, center_y)
end
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: If I have more than 200 food, train a Catnapper, otherwise train Pawdlers
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: train units based on food
-- Description: Train Catnappers if food > 200, otherwise train Pawdlers

local resources = ctx:get_resources()
local catTree = ctx:my_buildings("CatTree")[1] -- Get first CatTree

if not catTree then return end -- No CatTree found

if resources.food > 200 then
    ctx:train(catTree.id, "Catnapper")
else
    ctx:train(catTree.id, "Pawdler")
end
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Create a patrol route between my two Fish Markets
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: patrol
-- Description: Patrol between two Fish Markets with idle units

local markets = ctx:my_buildings("FishMarket")
if #markets < 2 then return end

local unit = ctx:idle_units()
if #unit == 0 then return end

local waypoints = {
    {x = markets[1].x, y = markets[1].y},
    {x = markets[2].x, y = markets[2].y}
}

ctx.behaviors:scout_pattern(unit[1].id, waypoints)
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Kite with Hissers but only if there are more than 3 melee enemies nearby
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: kite with Hissers
-- Description: Kite with Hissers only if there are more than 3 melee enemies nearby

local hissers = ctx:my_units("Hisser")
if #hissers == 0 then return end

local melee_enemies = {}
for _, enemy in ipairs(ctx:enemy_units()) do
    if enemy.attack_type == "Melee" then
        table.insert(melee_enemies, enemy)
    end
end

if #melee_enemies > 3 then
    ctx.behaviors:kite_squad({hissers})
end
```

devstral-small-2.prompt: Emergency macro: build 2 Litter Boxes, train 5 Chonks, and rally to map center
devstral-small-2.response:
```lua
-- Intent: emergency macro
-- Description: Build 2 Litter Boxes, train 5 Chonks, and rally to map center

-- Get resources and map center
local res = ctx:get_resources()
local map = ctx:map_size()
local center_x, center_y = math.floor(map.width / 2), math.floor(map.height / 2)

-- Find idle Pawdlers for building
local workers = ctx:idle_units("Pawdler")
if #workers == 0 then return end

-- Build 2 Litter Boxes if we have enough food
if res.food >= 200 then
    for i = 1, 2 do
        ctx:build({workers[i].id}, "LitterBox", center_x + i * 2, center_y + i * 2)
    end
end

-- Find CatTree for training
local cattree = ctx:my_buildings("CatTree")[1]
if cattree then
    -- Train 5 Chonks if we have enough food
    if res.food >= 300 then
        for i = 1, 5 do
            ctx:train(cattree.id, "Chonk")
        end
    end

    -- Set rally point to map center
    ctx:rally(cattree.id, center_x, center_y)
end
```
